visualizerParams.title: Butterfly Pattern Symmetry Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The butterfly pattern generator is not producing a symmetric shape. It seems the spacing calculation for the inner 'wings' is incorrect. Find and fix the error.

solution.explanation: To maintain a symmetric butterfly shape, the number of spaces in the middle must be double the distance from the edge (`2 * (n - i)`). The buggy code used only `(n - i)`, which made the butterfly look 'collapsed' and misaligned.
